global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with new hits available weekly.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo with the text 'StarVault' prominently displayed in a light color against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, eye-catching headline that reads 'Stream the hype' in a vibrant color, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that states 'New hits every week', designed to complement the main message.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in a bold font, designed to attract immediate attention.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small, clear price tag displaying '€29.99', positioned to draw attention without overwhelming the main message.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape that adds visual interest, positioned near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Background design
elements.description: A vibrant green background that creates a lively atmosphere for the ad's content.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week €29.92 Order now

elements.label: Top banner
elements.description: A rectangular banner at the top of the ad that contains the logo and enhances the overall design.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, StarVault logo, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, body text, and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: StarVault, Stream the hype, New hits every week, €29.99, Order now
